core_philosophy: Serious, data-dense, Bloomberg-inspired trading terminal. No playful elements. Function and clarity over decoration. Pure real-time technical aesthetic.

scale.labels: text-[10px] sm:text-xs uppercase tracking-[0.1em] font-semibold text-muted-foreground

typography.guidelines: Do not exceed text-4xl for headers in this dashboard environment. Use JetBrains Mono exclusively for tickers, prices, quantities, P&L numbers, order IDs, and timestamps. Use IBM Plex Sans for general UI labels, descriptions, and headings.

colors.guidelines: Strict dark mode. Never use pure #000000 without slight tint context, but #0A0A0A acts as our deep anchor. Avoid neon gradients; use solid bright colors (profit/loss) against dark layered grays for extreme legibility.

surfaces_and_micro_themes.cards: Grid Borders/Technical look. 1px solid border (#262626). Flat background (#141414). No drop shadows, rely on borders for definition.
surfaces_and_micro_themes.header: Solid background (#0A0A0A) with a sharp 1px bottom border (#262626). Sticky with z-50.
surfaces_and_micro_themes.buttons: Sharp or slightly rounded (rounded-sm). Primary buttons use brand color with white text. High contrast hover states (ligher hue).
surfaces_and_micro_themes.tables: Extremely compact layout (py-2 px-3 cells). Tabular lining for numbers. Alternating row colors (optional, use #0A0A0A and #141414) or just strong bottom borders per row.
surfaces_and_micro_themes.banners: Live trading warning banner must be high contrast (e.g., Background #FF9F0A, Text #000000) for unmissable visibility.

spacing_and_layout.grid_system: MODE B: The 'Control Room' Grid. grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4. Tight gaps (gap-4). Every pixel must be utilized. No jagged bottoms; use h-full to stretch.
spacing_and_layout.padding: Compact padding within cards (p-4 or p-5) to maximize data density.
spacing_and_layout.alignment: Left-align dense content and data. Right-align numerical columns in tables (prices, P&L, quantities) for easy decimal scanning.

components.table: Use Shadcn Table. Override cell paddings to be tighter (py-2). Ensure numeric columns are text-right and font-mono.
components.forms: Use Shadcn Forms/Inputs. Inputs must have background #0A0A0A, border #262626, focus ring #007AFF.
components.badges: Use Shadcn Badges. Flat design, no heavy rounded pills. 1px border. E.g., connection status (green dot + text).
components.tabs: Use Shadcn Tabs. Override height h-9 to h-auto. Minimalist styling, border-bottom indicator preferred over full pill backgrounds.

motion_and_interactions.hover: Background color shifts on table rows and buttons. Essential for row-tracking in dense tables.
motion_and_interactions.focus: High contrast 2px ring (#007AFF) with 2px offset (dark) for accessibility.
motion_and_interactions.transitions: Fast, subtle. transition: background-color 0.15s ease, border-color 0.15s ease. No bouncy animations.

login_background.description: Abstract dark metallic wave pattern. Use as split-screen visual for the login page to give a high-end tech feel.

brand_logo.description: Minimalist circular logo. Use for the main application header and login screen brand identifier.

icons.instructions: Use Lucide React. Keep icons functional. Size 16px (w-4 h-4) for UI buttons, 20px (w-5 h-5) for section headers.

testing.attributes: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a `data-testid` attribute (e.g., data-testid='login-submit-button', data-testid='order-table-row', data-testid='pnl-value').

instructions_to_main_agent.1: Global Setup: Apply strict dark mode across the entire app. Update Tailwind config with the specified colors (e.g., bg-app, bg-card, text-primary, text-secondary, accent-profit, accent-loss).
instructions_to_main_agent.2: Fonts: Import IBM Plex Sans and JetBrains Mono from Google Fonts. Apply JetBrains Mono globally to all numeric data, tickers, logs, and P&L.
instructions_to_main_agent.3: Login Page: Split-screen design. Left/Top half features the 'login_background' image with an overlay. Right/Bottom half is the Google Login button and minimal branding.
instructions_to_main_agent.4: Dashboard Header: Contains the Brand Logo, App Name, and the 'Live Trading warning banner' prominently displayed at the top or immediately below the header.
instructions_to_main_agent.5: Kotak Neo Setup Card: A structured form requiring Mobile, Password, Consumer Key, Consumer Secret, MPIN, and a clear OTP submission sub-flow. Use Shadcn forms.
instructions_to_main_agent.6: Data Tables (Positions & Logs): Must feel like a Bloomberg terminal. High density, right-aligned numbers. Profit must be bright green (#00C805), Loss bright red (#FF3B30). Trade logs should mimic a terminal output.
instructions_to_main_agent.7: Webhook URL & Alerts: Prominent Webhook URL card with a 'Copy to Clipboard' button. Alert configs displayed as a dense list with toggle switches.
instructions_to_main_agent.8: EMA10 Stoploss Panel: Needs to feel like a critical 'Command' block. The 'Run EMA10 SL Now' button should be highly distinct, possibly with a warning/amber accent or a specialized confirmation state.
